industry.competitorWeakness: Generic answering services that just take messages. None built specifically for [industry].

salesAgent.firstMessage: Hey there! Thanks for calling [ProductName]. I'm the AI that answers phones for [industry] — and yeah, you're actually talking to me right now. Are you a [ownerTitle] looking to catch more calls?
situationQuestions: Tell me about your [businessType] — how many [units] are you running?
Who's answering your phones right now?
How many calls would you say you get on a typical day?
problemQuestions: What happens when you're busy and the phone rings?
How often do calls end up going to voicemail?
What about after hours — those calls just go nowhere?
implicationStatements: If you're missing even 10 calls a week, and the average [avgTicketLabel] is around $[avgTicketValue]... that's almost $[weeklyRevenue] a week walking out the door.
A first-time caller who gets voicemail almost never calls back.
That's not just lost revenue today — that's a customer who could've been coming back for years.
needPayoffQuestions: What if every single call was answered instantly, 24/7?
Would it help if after every call you got a text saying exactly who called and what they need?

objections.I already have someone answering phones: That's great! But what happens when they're on another line, at lunch, or after 5pm? [ProductName] is backup — catches everything your team can't.
objections.I don't trust AI: I totally get that. And honestly... we're having this conversation right now, and I'm [ProductName]. This is the same AI that would answer your [businessType]'s phones. How's it feel so far?
objections.Too expensive: The [avgTicketLabel] is $[avgTicketValue]. If [ProductName] catches ONE missed call per week, that's almost $[monthlyRecovery] a month. For $199. The math speaks for itself.
objections.Need to think about it: Absolutely. But the free trial is zero risk — no credit card. Let me just send you the link so you have it.
objections.Can I try it free?: Yeah! [trialDays]-day free trial, no credit card. Let me get your info and send you the link right now.

salesAgent.closeScript: Here's what I'd suggest — let's get you started right now. We have a free [trialDays]-day trial, no credit card needed to start. But if you want to lock in the Starter plan at $199 a month, I can send a secure payment link straight to your phone right now. Takes like 30 seconds. Which sounds better — the free trial or jumping straight into the full plan?

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thanks for calling {shopName}! This is [ProductName], your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

Tap the link to complete your signup. Once done, we'll automatically set up your AI phone agent and text you your login info.

📋 Next steps for {shopName}:

Your dedicated AI phone number: {twilioNumber}

To go live, set up call forwarding from your {shopName} main line to {twilioNumber}.

landingPage.heroSubtitle: AI-powered phone answering built specifically for [industry]. Every call answered. Every customer served. 24/7/365.
landingPage.problemStatement: The average [businessType] misses 30% of incoming calls. Each missed call is a $[avgTicketValue] [avgTicketLabel] walking out the door.
landingPage.solutionStatement: [ProductName] answers every call with an AI that knows your services, books appointments, and texts you a recap — all in real time.
socialProof: Catches an average of 47 missed calls per month
